title: Top Materials Traded With
query: SELECT SUM(p.Quantity) AS TotalMaterialsPaid FROM MaterialTrade_Paid p JOIN MaterialTrade t ON p.MaterialTrade_event_id = t.event_id WHERE t.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND t.event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(p.Material_localised, p.Material) AS Material, SUM(p.Quantity) AS TimesPaid FROM MaterialTrade_Paid p JOIN MaterialTrade t ON p.MaterialTrade_event_id = t.event_id WHERE t.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND t.event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Material ORDER BY TimesPaid DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: Top materials given to material traders during the report period.
details.help: MaterialTrade_Paid shows which materials were most frequently used to pay for trades.

tagLines: The inefficiency is the cost of not wanting to grind the specific node.
What you give is what you have.
Material traders exist for inventory flexibility.
